rubric_expression: enhancing the root membrane CONDUCTANCE (kappa_d) closes the PFDoDA long-chain residual => support; conductance has no effect (the GHK anion-exclusion ceiling caps Cw at Cwo/e^N regardless of kappa_d) => refute

panel.basis: root unchanged at ~1 vs 69 across 5000x kappa_d -- exclusion ceiling, not a conductance limit.
GHK drives Cw_m->Cwo/e^N regardless of kappa_d; the passive route is capped.

chief.basis: Decisive: increasing the membrane conductance kappa_d 1x->5000x leaves PFDoDA root at ~1 vs 69 (unchanged). The GHK pathway is capped by anion exclusion -- the internal free conc ceiling is Cwo/e^N (e^N~107) independent of kappa_d -- so conductance cannot lift the long chain. Refuted.
